overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-speed drive through Night City. The player navigates a futuristic sports car along elevated highways, transitioning from industrial outskirts through neon-lit urban canyons to a toll plaza. The footage features ray-traced lighting, holographic advertisements, and dense futuristic architecture.

events.description: vehicle accelerates while changing lanes to pass slower traffic

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the elevated highway, weaving between vehicles while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive concrete support columns with orange and white striped bases
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke against the skyline
holographic display with green and red neon indicators inside the vehicle
futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway with industrial smokestacks visible in the distance. The driver accelerates through moderate traffic, passing concrete pillars while the futuristic glass skyline of the city grows larger ahead. The dashboard displays holographic readouts as the vehicle maintains high speed on the sunlit asphalt.

events.description: passes under first major highway overpass, entering urban canyon with reduced sky visibility
alternating light and shadow as passing under multiple overpass structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban highway infrastructure, passing under overpasses while surrounded by towering buildings

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the right side, moving at high speed

entered.detail: multi-level highway interchange with red structural elements and concrete decking
raised train tracks running parallel to the highway on metal supports
illuminated commercial signs beginning to appear on building facades

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a dense urban environment with multiple overpasses creating alternating patterns of light and shadow. The industrial smokestacks fade from view as corporate glass towers rise on both sides. The driver passes under red-structured highway interchanges while neon signage begins to appear on the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk highway with holographic advertisements

events.description: enters fully covered highway section with artificial neon lighting replacing sunlight
exits covered section back into bright daylight, creating lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: cruising through the covered neon-lit highway section, maintaining steady speed beneath holographic displays

entered.detail: enclosed roadway with overhead structure blocking sky, lined with support columns
large floating digital billboards displaying animated neon advertisements in Japanese and English
massive screen spanning the highway showing commercial imagery with blue and orange hues

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a covered urban canyon where natural light is replaced by the glow of holographic advertisements and neon signage. Massive digital billboards span the roadway, displaying animated cyberpunk commercial imagery. The enclosed space creates an artificial lighting environment until the vehicle emerges back into bright sunlight at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with green acoustic barriers

events.description: changes lanes to the right, passing a slower vehicle

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the open highway, changing lanes while approaching the toll plaza area

notable_agents.action: green sports car being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: tall green acoustic walls with horizontal ridges lining the right side of the highway
large green highway toll plaza structure with multiple lanes and overhead signage
metal safety fencing with diagonal supports along the elevated roadway edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered section, the highway opens up with green acoustic barriers lining the right side. The driver weaves through moderate traffic while approaching a large green toll gantry structure in the distance. The road is bordered by safety fencing as it curves gently through the elevated urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza passage with overhead canopy

events.description: enters the toll plaza area passing under the green gantry structure
slight deceleration while navigating through the toll plaza lanes

agents.ego_description: navigating through the toll plaza, passing under the canopy structure while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: silver sedan ahead slowing down as it passes through the toll checkpoint

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overhead structure covering the toll plaza with green painted supports
overhead directional signage indicating lanes for the toll plaza

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the toll plaza, passing under a massive green-painted concrete canopy that partially covers the roadway. Overhead signage indicates lane directions while the driver maintains speed through the checkpoint area. The segment ends as the car exits the toll structure back onto the open elevated highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from the industrial outskirts of the city into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a sunlit elevated highway, accelerating past concrete pillars with industrial smokestacks visible in the far distance while holographic readouts glow on the dashboard. As the vehicle maintains its speed, the distant glass skyline grows larger and more imposing, gradually replacing the industrial horizon. The scene then shifts as the highway enters the city center, where the open sky is overtaken by corporate glass towers and red-structured interchanges that create alternating patterns of light and shadow. Finally, the environment closes in as the driver passes under massive overpasses, with the bright daylight giving way to the first flickers of neon signage on the surrounding buildings.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that transitions from a neon-lit urban canyon into an open highway and through a massive toll plaza. It begins as the vehicle enters a covered section of the roadway, where natural light is replaced by the artificial glow of massive holographic advertisements and animated digital billboards. As the car emerges from this enclosed space back into bright sunlight, the environment opens up to reveal green acoustic barriers and safety fencing lining the elevated road. The camera then weaves through moderate traffic, approaching a large green toll gantry that looms in the distance. Finally, the vehicle passes under a massive green-painted concrete canopy and through the checkpoint area before exiting the structure back onto the open highway.
